asr_es: Nos sumamos a las palabras del señor Esbóboda, que creo que representa a una amplia mayoría, si no a toda la comisión y al Parlamento. Si desea la señora comisaria decir una última palabra, pues si no lo desea le agradecemos su trabajo hoy, a lo largo de estos años, y procederemos a la votación de este informe a partir de las 12 horas, es decir, inmediatamente. Queda cerrado este debate y presidirá el presidente señor Cox. Gracias.
hypothesis_en: I would like to ask the Commissioner whether he is aware of the fact that, in the case of the Commission's proposal for a regulation, there is no provision in the regulation itself for the Member States to be able to impose a ceiling on the quantities of beef and veal imported from third countries which are not members of the Community, and whether the Commission is aware of the fact that, in the case of the Commission's proposal for a regulation, there is no provision in the regulation for the Member States to impose a ceiling on the quantities of beef and veal imported from third countries which are not members of the Community.
reference_en: we all support the words of Mr Swoboda which I'm sure represent the (1.38) majority view of Parliament Madam Commissioner do you wish to take the floor again well no so we'd like to thank you for your work today and in the course of the years and we shall now move to the vote (2.32) as from twelve that is immediately so the debate is closed
source_es: nos sumamos a las palabras del Señor Swoboda que creo que representa a una amplia mayoría si no a toda la Comisión y al Parlamento si desea la señora Comisaria decir una última palabra pues si no lo desea le agradecemos su trabajo hoy a lo largo de estos años y procedemos procederemos a la votación de este informe a partir de las doce horas es decir inmediatamente queda cerrado este debate y presidirá el presidente Señor Cox
